title: The Strange Case of Chaim Weiss

scenes.text: A 16-year-old mysteriously vanished, leaving behind unanswered questions.
Chaim Weiss disappeared from Brooklyn, New York, in 1992.
Despite extensive searches and media coverage, he was never found.
His case remains an enduring mystery, still unsolved.
scenes.label: STILL UNSOLVED

scenes.text: Follow if the unknown keeps you up at night.

description: 📍 New York, USA - 1992. Chaim Weiss, only 16, vanished without a trace from Brooklyn. His case remains a mystery, leaving many unanswered questions. Follow for daily mysteries!
